fields.description: Groups related rows together, e.g. all variants of the same Shopify product, or all documents (Sales Order/Invoice/Payment Entry) created from one Shopify order.
fields.label: Group Key

fields.description: Shopify's own ID for this entity (GID or numeric REST ID).
fields.label: Shopify ID

fields.description: Fingerprint of the data as last seen coming FROM Shopify (webhook/API). Used to detect and skip echoes of our own prior write.
fields.label: Shopify-side Fingerprint

fields.description: Fingerprint of the data as last seen coming FROM Alaiy OS (doc event). Used to detect and skip echoes of our own prior write.
fields.label: Alaiy OS-side Fingerprint
